# Kanto Region
Tokyo and the cultural and natural treasures just at itsdoorstep
Prefectures:
* [Tochigi](https://www.japan-guide.com/list/e1210.html)
* [Gunma](https://www.japan-guide.com/list/e1209.html)

* [Tokyo](https://www.japan-guide.com/e/e2164.html)
* [Kanagawa](https://www.japan-guide.com/list/e1215.html)
Prefectures:
* [Tochigi](https://www.japan-guide.com/list/e1210.html)

The Kanto Region (ŠÖ“Œ, Kantō, literally "east of the border") contains Japan's largest plain and is very densely populated. The large metropolises of [Tokyo](https://www.japan-guide.com/e/e2164.html) and [Yokohama](https://www.japan-guide.com/e/e2156.html) are located in the Kanto Region which consists of seven prefectures.
